title: BreweryX >!BreweryTimer!<
description: Visualizes your brewing process! Displays live cooking and aging stats above BreweryX stations.
body:
🍺 BreweryTimer - Make Brewing Easier!

Tired of constantly clicking on cauldrons to check the time? Or opening barrels just to see if your drink is aged? BreweryTimer solves this!

This addon creates dynamic holograms above your BreweryX stations using DecentHolograms.

👀 What it does: 🔥 Cooking Live: Watch the minutes tick by right above the cauldron. 🍷 Aging Status: Instantly see exactly how many years your brew has aged inside a barrel. 🔔 Audio Alerts: Hear a gentle bell sound every 5 minutes while cooking. 🌍 Localization: Comes with English and Russian support out of the box, but you can translate it to any language in the config.

📦 Dependencies • BreweryX • DecentHolograms

🚀 How to use Simply install the plugin and start brewing! The holograms appear automatically when you start cooking or place brews in a barrel.
